name: Ria Money Transfer - Esmeraldas Jewerly Inc
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance provider offering international money transfers to 190+ countries through multiple channels including online, mobile app, in-person locations, and WhatsApp.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has been operating for over 35 years as an established international money transfer service. The company specializes in sending and receiving money worldwide, with a network spanning more than 600,000 locations across 190+ countries and territories. Their platform processes over a billion transfers, indicating significant transaction volume and operational scale in the remittance industry.

Ria's core offerings include multiple money-sending methods: online transfers through their website, mobile app transfers, in-person cash payments at physical locations, and WhatsApp-based transfers. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickups at partner locations, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawals. The service supports transfers in over 100 currencies and includes tools like a currency converter and IBAN calculator to help customers understand rates before committing to a transfer.

The company distinguishes itself through convenience options unusual for traditional money transfer services, particularly the WhatsApp money transfer feature allowing transfers directly through chat. They emphasize speed (transfers in seconds), a 100% satisfaction guarantee, and competitive exchange rates. Ria is also positioned as an official sponsor of the Mexican National Team, indicating brand recognition and investment in market presence. Their mobile app maintains strong ratings (4.9 stars on iOS, 4.8 on Google Play, 4.5 on Trustpilot with 34,700+ reviews).

While Ria offers legitimate money transfer services with substantial reach and user satisfaction, consumers should note that specific fee structures vary by corridor, delivery method, and payment method. The website shows sample fees (like $1.99 USD for Mexico transfers) but doesn't provide comprehensive fee transparency for all routes. Exchange rates fluctuate and may not always be optimal compared to alternatives. The company's strength lies in accessibility and convenience rather than competing primarily on lowest cost.
address: Esmeraldas Jewerly Inc, 1789 W San Carlos St, San Jose, CA 95128

company_info.headquarters: Esmeraldas Jewerly Inc, 1789 W San Carlos St, San Jose, CA 95128

pros: 600,000+ locations worldwide for cash pickup and sending, providing significant physical accessibility
Multiple sending methods including WhatsApp transfers, offering flexibility for tech-savvy users
Covers 190+ countries and territories with support for 100+ currencies, enabling broad international coverage
Fast transfer speeds (seconds) with real-time tracking available for monitoring transfers
Strong customer satisfaction ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot with 230k+ reviews)
100% satisfaction guarantee providing consumer protection and confidence in service
35+ years operational history demonstrating longevity and established trust in the remittance market
cons: Fee structure not transparently disclosed for all corridors; website only shows sample rates for select routes
Exchange rates and fees vary significantly by country, delivery method, and payment method, making comparison difficult
Mobile app (despite high ratings) requires registration and account setup before conducting transfers
Competitive pressure from established banks and newer fintech services may result in non-optimal rates for some corridors
No mention of regulatory compliance details, CFSA membership, or specific consumer protections beyond satisfaction guarantee
best_for: International workers and immigrants sending regular remittances to family in developing nations
Consumers prioritizing convenience and multiple sending/receiving options over lowest-cost transfers
Users already comfortable with WhatsApp seeking integrated social payment functionality
Individuals needing cash pickup options in markets with limited banking infrastructure
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for individuals and families needing convenient, multi-channel international money transfers with broad geographic coverage. The main caveat is that consumers should compare specific rates and fees for their particular corridor and delivery method before transferring, as fees and exchange rates vary significantly and aren't transparently listed upfront on the website.
services: Mobile app money transfers with tracking
In-person cash payments at physical locations
